context.pre_match_notes: Qualifying: Verstappen P1 by 0.3 seconds over nearest rival. Silverstone: high-speed circuit, aerodynamic-dependent. Red Bull strongest car that season, Verstappen dominant (6 wins in 9 races). Qualifying delta of 0.3s at a high-speed track is a SportMind strong signal — particularly at circuits where overtaking is difficult.

question: Predict race winner. What does a 0.3s qualifying delta signal at a high-speed circuit like Silverstone?

verified_outcome.key_variable: qualifying_delta_modifier — 0.3s margin at Silverstone = dominant race pace; hard to overcome on low-overtake circuit
